title: Aalu Shaders
description: Extremely lightweight shaders with shadows and reflections.
body:
### ABOUT

Aalu Shaders is a lightweight low-end shader made for players who want smooth FPS with impressive visual effects. Built with high optimization in mind, it brings amazing features without heavily affecting performance. It includes smart Auto Exposure that automatically increases brightness in dark areas and lowers it in overly bright places for a more natural look. It also features realistic water reflections and visual enhancements while staying optimized for lower-end devices.

**Key Features:**

- Motion Blur
- Auto Exposure
- Water Reflections
- DOF (Depth of Field)
